cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which present Eve ends up with after all the swaps. I think the best way to do this is to track each person's present step by step through each exchange. Let me start by listing their initial presents and then go through each swap one by one. Starting off: - Alice has a yellow present. - Bob has an orange ball. - Claire has a red present. - Dave has a purple present. - Eve has a green present. First swap: Alice and Eve swap gifts. So after this swap, Alice will have Eve's original present and vice versa. Let me note that down: - Alice now has green present (from Eve). - Eve now has yellow present (from Alice).
